chunks.text: ORDER SHEET HIGH COURT OF SINDH CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P No.D-1017 of 2024 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 10.11.2025 Mr. Abdul Qadeer, advocate for the petitioners *** Learned counsel for the petitioners, under instructions, does not press this petition, which stands dismissed accordingly. JUDGE JUDGE Sajjad Ali Jessar
